query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as category_count FROM position_categories WHERE positionId = 4;
SELECT COUNT(*) as question_count FROM position_questions WHERE categoryId IN (SELECT id FROM position_categories WHERE positionId = 4);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as category_count FROM position_categories WHERE positionId = 4;
SELECT COUNT(*) as question_count FROM position_questions WHERE categoryId IN (SELECT id FROM position_categories WHERE positionId = 4);
